import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(all, "\n")
  mut last = ""
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(l)
      l
    when None
      ""
    end
    let stripped = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(stripped)
      last = line
      found = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println(last)
  else
    println("(none)")
  end
end
